session.user:
Run the following commands and report results:
1. `uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_shared.py -v` 2. `uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_finalize_pr.py -v`
Report all results including any failures.
session.assistant: I'll run these pytest commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on test_shared.py with verbose output

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on test_finalize_pr.py with verbose output
